title: miltitzia glandulifera
intro: Miltitzia glandulifera, also known as the Chinese honeysuckle or Lian Qiao, is a plant species native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Miltitzia glandulifera is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also dried and used as a powder in traditional Chinese medicine.
